name: Snake
author: Poki
description: Snake is the ultimate version of everyone's favorite classic. No more asking for your parents' phones so you can play some Snake! You now have a better and improved version of Snake right at your fingertips. This time you can enjoy adjustable speeds, various bonuses, and even more types of snakes! Feed the snake and keep it alive until you drop new eggs. Can you slither your way onto the top position on the leaderboards? How to play: Choose between the Touch Mode and the Button Mode when starting a round. Don't let the snake's head touch the edges or its own body. Navigate - Arrow keys About the creator: Snake is created by CoolGames.
